macro.label: Consolidation Range
macro.notes: Liquidity sweep at the low: lasts 5 candles. Ends at breakout (sweep) to the downside.

macro.label: Re-entry into Previous Consolidation Range
macro.notes: re-entry after liquidity sweep, previous macro lower bound re-established. Ends at breakout to the upside (candle 129)

micro.label: Micro Range 1
micro.notes: 25 candle range, micro auction just above macro auction lower bound.

micro.label: Micro Range 2
micro.notes: micro auction pressing up against macro auction upper bound, suggests strong buy pressure and a looming breakout to the upside.

support.label: Support 2
support.notes: This support level is formed at 50% of the candle 1's range. Candle 1 (second candle in the session) is the highest buyside volume of the session.

resistance.label: Resistance 1
resistance.notes: This level is near the high of the highest sellside volume of the session (Candle 14), indicating heightened interest at this level. This is confirmed at candle 44 when price rejects sharply off of this resistance level.

macro.label: Macro Auction 2
macro.notes: This auction is formed after bouncing off the residual volume from Candle 1 in the session, and is subsequently rejected off of the underside area of the previous macro auction lower bound and first macro support level, forming another auction range just below the previous one. We can identify these presses against the previous support level's underside as rejections given the abundant doji candles at this level, suggestive of indecision.

level_interactions.notes: These interactions are the basis for the second macro auction range formation and classification.
Residual volume from the highest buyside volume candle in the session (Candle 1) creates this potential support level and price action confirms it.

This is another proof of the previou macro auction lower bound and first support level's break then converting to resistance and the formation of the second macro auction's upper bound, as confirmed by the abundant doji candles at this level, supporting the rejection classification.

support.label: Support 1
support.notes: Support level near the Resistance 1 breakout, just slightly above it. Probable base forming here.

support.label: Support 2
support.notes: Neutral designation due to the dwindling volume following the initially strong buyside volume at the breakout of Micro Auction 1 (upper bound).

resistance.label: Resistance 1
resistance.notes: Designated very_strong due to the initial ambiguity in volume, but then resolved by the increae in volume and strong close above the wicks, eliminating that ambiguity and strongly confirming the breakout and potential start of a buyside trend.

resistance.label: Resistance 2
resistance.notes: Strong resistance level formed after the breakout from the base and the high of the move having the highest volume of the session, marking a likely resistance level.

resistance.label: Resistance 3
resistance.notes: Very strong resistance level given the abundant doji candles pressing the underside of the level and rejecting off of it multiple times.

macro.label: Macro 1
macro.notes: Very probable auction range given the elevated buyside activity following the break above Resistance 1, with the high of the auction being the high of the impulse (highest sellside volume of the session) and the low being just above the break of Resistance 1.

micro.label: Micro 1
micro.notes: Micro auction formed at the lower bound of Macro auction 1, suggesting bearish pressure buildup, but then price resolves higher (break above micro auction upper bound, significantly reducing the odds of a potential bearish pressure buildup/breakdown.

micro.label: Micro 2
micro.notes: Micro auction formed at the upper bound of Macro auction 1, suggesting bullish pressure buildup.

support.label: Support 2
support.notes: Strong support level after a buyside impulse following the initial sellside cascade. A breach of this level is likely to lead to lower prices.

resistance.label: Resistance 1
resistance.notes: Resistance level established quickly in the session, price fails to accept above.

resistance.label: Resistance 2
resistance.notes: Well established resistance level: 7 candles interact with this level and close below, indicating signficant sellside interest. A breach of this level is likely to lead to higher prices.

macro.label: Macro 1
macro.notes: Macro auction formed at the highs of the session.

micro.label: Micro 1
micro.notes: Micro auction formed just above the low of the session.

significant_candles.notes: Sellside shows significant aggression evidenced by volume delta/taker volume, and price moves disproportionately (less to the downside than the preceding candles that had less volume).
